english_news.summary: Donald Trump Jr. was previously married to Vanessa Trump, with whom he has five children. She disclosed this week that she has breast cancer.

english_news.summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

english_news.summary: Latest polls suggest the centre-right figure is the only candidate who can defeat Marine Le Pen or Jean-Luc Mélenchon.

english_news.title: Tulsi Gabbard to resign as US national intelligence director
english_news.summary: Gabbard who has been largely out of public view during recent US operations says she is leaving due to her husband's illness.

english_news.summary: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？

一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点会比预想来得更快。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

郑王宇丨36氪基金投资副总裁（主持）

龚毅丨

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。

只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

帮主丨36氪《AI局内人》主播（主持）

郑鹏宇丨杭州颜柯教育科技有限公司创始人

肖玛峰丨AI招聘平台TTC创始

chinese_news.title: 对话王小川：离开通用人工智能的主干道之后
chinese_news.summary:
“如果没有转型，继续走主流道路，你也会有同等程度的焦虑。”王小川说，这次转型，让他真正回归到从创业第一天就最想做的事情：造AI医生。

访谈｜邓咏仪 杨轩

文｜邓咏仪

编辑｜张雨忻

一年前，王小川带着百川智能来了一次激烈的“大刹车”：大幅缩减通用模型团队，关闭金融等多条行业线，All in医疗大模型。但与此同时，整个大模型行业却热闹非凡，大厂和创业公司轮番进行“轰炸

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：AI浓度与转化率：数字体验的实战增长法则
chinese_news.summary:
AI浓度并非越高越好，转化率的秘密在于人机共生的平衡点。

“AI应像手机一样贯穿全流程”，而面对亲子游客和老年群体，主动将AI浓度降至50%，却实现了超50%的转化率。浓度的关键是以人为本、文化温度先行。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

薛冰丨上海蜚语信息科技副总裁（主持）

崔健南丨广州搞搞镇文化科技创始人兼CEO

杨晟丨珀乐互动科技创始人

薛冰：各位嘉宾大家下午好，我是主持人薛冰，很荣幸受到36氪

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 北大项目孵化，国内首家原生机器人“大脑芯片”企业获数亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京维泛智能科技有限公司（以下简称“维泛智能”）近日完成数亿元种子轮融资，由中关村资本及旗下启航投资联合领投，上海未来产业基金、石溪资本、佰维存储、燕创集团、海益投资、探元创投共同投资。

维泛智能成立于2025年5月，孵化自北京大学类脑芯片实验室（PAICORE Lab），专注于具身智能“大小脑”融合芯片研发，致力于打造全国产化机器人核心计算方案。

联合创始人殷积磊毕业于北京大学，拥有超过20年半导体行业经验，曾任知存科技COO兼研发副总裁，以及IBM、GlobalFoundries芯片研发总监，并曾在MTK、VIA等企业从事芯片研发工作。团队核心成员均来自IBM、华为、腾讯等行业头部企业。

随着具身智能快速发展，机器人“大脑”算法持续演进，对通用芯片平台提出了更高要求。机器人“大脑”芯片不仅需要承载多模态感知与AI推理，还需要兼顾运动控制等核心计算任务，是机器人完成交互、决策与执行的“中枢神经”。

chinese_news.title: 用AI来管公司，Moka推出三款AI HR工具｜涌现新栏目
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜梁键强

编辑｜王毓婵

一句话介绍

Moka为AI人力资源软件服务商，早期从智能化招聘管理系统起步，后逐步扩展至更完整的HR管理系统。5月，Moka上线了招聘Eva、人事Eva和BPEva三款AI HR产品。

招聘Eva覆盖招聘全流程，辅助企业完成识人、筛选和面试；人事Eva聚焦报表处理、流程流转和员工咨询等重复事务；BPEva则用于动态更新人才画像，辅助企业进行人才识别和组织决策。

支撑这三款产品的是Moka AI工坊，它相当于底层能力平台，可以让企业用业务语言描述需求，具有快速响应、个性化定制和安全上线等能力。

chinese_news.title: 千禧年流行的老式漂亮饭，居然翻红了
chinese_news.summary:
过去这几年，餐饮行业的新店越开越多，淘汰速度也越来越快。精致餐饮仍在发展，但人们愿意为摆盘和氛围买单的冲动在减弱，转而开始寻求一种体面而高性价比的社交空间。

在这样的节奏中，上岛咖啡、米萝咖啡、老树咖啡、良木缘、绿茵阁、豪享来等颇具年代感的老式咖啡餐吧，又开始悄悄爬上了年轻人的打卡清单。

二三十年前，它们是城市里最洋气的餐厅，菜单上写着影视剧男女主角才会点的黑椒牛排意面和卡布奇诺咖啡。隔壁桌是商务人士谈生意，或是时髦情侣在约会，小朋友则眼巴巴地等着大人给自己点上一碗香蕉船。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kevin Warsh raise the federal funds rate at least once before end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh just sworn in as Fed chair; crypto traders pricing in rate hikes per Cointelegraph; his stated regime-shift doctrine toward smaller market intervention creates ambiguity on inflation response.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Warsh sworn in, traders forecast rate hikes 2026); CNBC (Warsh regime change narrative)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $72,000 on December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: $1.26B ETF outflows triggered contrarian buy signals; Michael Saylor hinted MicroStrategy may sell in 2026 (tail risk); Warsh Fed pivot uncertainty creates volatility demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (ETF outflows, Saylor commentary); CoinDesk (Bitcoin moving lower on Warsh appointment)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Qualcomm stock outperform the Nasdaq-100 by >15% through end of Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reported investor 'waking up' to AI device boom centered on Qualcomm; chipset leadership in edge AI devices remains uncrowded trade vs. hyperscaler narrative.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Qualcomm stock pop, AI devices boom)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum trade below $2,000 at any point between now and June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh rate-hike rhetoric cooling risk sentiment; Ethereum fundamentals remain strong per analysts but macro headwinds are real; no clear catalyst for new all-time highs.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Ethereum long-term buy thesis, but macro uncertainty); CoinDesk (Bitcoin/rate dynamics)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the DOJ's $1.8B 'lawfare' compensation fund distribute >$500M to claimants by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump administration just created the fund in exchange for dropping IRS lawsuit; distribution speed and eligibility criteria will signal political commitment and legal exposure.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX complete a crewed landing on Mars before January 1, 2027?

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (F2Pool founder Mars mission lead); BBC (Starship V3 successful test flight)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the SEC approve an Ethereum spot ETF (not futures) before July 1, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC official approval or rejection statement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SEC Commissioner Peirce actively countering anti-crypto sentiment; recent crypto regulation momentum in Congress (Minnesota banks, Clarity Act); Bitcoin ETF approval precedent removes key friction.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (SEC Commissioner Peirce pushback on synthetic token rules, crypto-friendly Congress moves)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will IMAX be acquired or enter definitive acquisition agreement before November 1, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC 8-K filing, company press release, or reliable M&A reporting (Bloomberg, Reuters)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reported preliminary talks; streaming recovery incomplete; activist investor pressure likely; $2B+ market cap attracts strategic buyers in content/tech sectors.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (preliminary IMAX acquisition talks, intermediaries involved)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the US 10-year Treasury yield close above 4.5% at any point between now and September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve H.15 statistical release or Bloomberg Terminal
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Warsh regime shift toward less market intervention could trigger bond repricing; inflation dynamics post-election spending unclear; current market pricing in only modest upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC/CoinDesk (Warsh Fed chair, rate hike expectations, smaller intervention doctrine)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a major Chinese tech or AI company announce a significant US IPO or direct listing before June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR filing or company official announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese AI talent scarcity and productization debates (36Kr) suggest winners emerging; geopolitical uncertainty priced in heavily, but bilateral deal structures or Hong Kong-US listing hybrids could surprise.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin outperformance vs. Ethereum through Q3 2026 as institutional rate-hike hedging accelerates under Warsh regime.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Warsh sworn in, traders forecast rate hikes 2026; BTC moving lower on appointment suggests repositioning in progress
CoinDesk: Bitcoin ETF outflows ($1.26B) are contrarian buy signal per Santiment
CNBC: Warsh regime emphasizes smaller Fed market intervention—long-duration assets (BTC) repricing upward
investment_theses.counter_view: Saylor's hint that MicroStrategy may sell BTC in 2026 could trigger forced selling; Ethereum's DeFi yield and Shanghai upgrades may attract yield-chasing capital as rates fall instead of rise.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD perps, short ETH/USD perps, or buy BTC call spreads / sell ETH call spreads via Deribit; allocate 2-3% of portfolio to BTC on dips below $65k

investment_theses.thesis: Qualcomm outperformance as AI device SOC cycle reaches peak adoption and competition consolidates away from Broadcom/Marvell.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Investors waking up' to Qualcomm's AI device boom role; stock already running but momentum suggests crowding into edge AI thesis not yet complete
36Kr: AI products failing at application-layer ROI; companies searching for edge AI / on-device solutions as infrastructure builds out—Qualcomm is the chokepoint
investment_theses.counter_view: Antitrust scrutiny on Qualcomm's modem licensing; Apple and Samsung may design own chips, reducing addressable market; oversaturation of AI device hype.
investment_theses.expression: Buy QCOM 15-20% allocation in growth sleeve; pair with short NVDA on perceived valuation stretch; or buy QCOM call spreads (June 2026 $220/$240)

investment_theses.thesis: Long USD (DXY) / short EM currencies as Warsh's measured intervention doctrine creates uncertainty and safe-haven demand.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Warsh regime emphasizes 'clearer rules' and smaller day-to-day intervention, creating hedging demand for fiat reserves
CoinDesk: Bitcoin traders pricing in rate-hike risk under Warsh; flight-to-quality into USD likely as equities de-risk
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump administration may push for weaker USD to support manufacturing; DXY already elevated; carry traders crowded into short-USD positions, reversals asymmetric downside.
investment_theses.expression: Buy DXY ETF (UUP) 5-8% allocation; short high-beta EM ETFs (EEM) or emerging market carry baskets; buy USD/MXN call spreads

investment_theses.thesis: Regulatory catalysts in crypto (Minnesota banks, Clarity Act momentum, Polymarket/Kalshi probe resolution) create optionality for midsized crypto infrastructure plays (NEAR, Hyperliquid ecosystem).
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Minnesota empowering local banks for crypto; Tom Emmer brushing off law enforcement concerns on Clarity Act; Congress probing Polymarket/Kalshi insider trading
Crypto Trending: NEAR, HYPE showing momentum in volatile sentiment window
investment_theses.counter_view: Insider trading probe could crush prediction market confidence and regulatory appetite; local bank crypto initiatives unlikely to move needle; SEC remains structurally opposed to L1 tokens.
investment_theses.expression: Accumulate NEAR or HYPE on dips using 2-3% allocation; or buy synthetic exposure via DEX baskets (e.g., liquidity mining rewards on Hyperliquid); hedge with short Ethereum in case regulatory crackdown favors base layers

investment_theses.thesis: Long gold and short real rates as Warsh's 'regime change' narrative creates inflation uncertainty and flight-to-safety positioning.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Warsh emphasizes 'clearer rules' rather than aggressive easing; ambiguity on rate path creates real-rate volatility
CoinDesk: Crypto traders pricing in rate hikes despite BTC ETF outflows—market discounting multiple rate outcomes
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh more hawkish than Powell; real rates may rise, crushing gold; strong USD headwinds if capital flows shift to dollar safety.
investment_theses.expression: Buy GLD (gold ETF) 3-5% allocation; pair with long TIPS / short nominal Treasuries to express real-rate repricing; or buy gold call options (GLD June calls, +$15-20 strike from current)
